---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for CodeFox-CLI
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Problem or motivation

What problem does this solve, or what workflow would it improve? (e.g. "I want to run CodeFox in CI and post the result as a PR comment.")

## Proposed solution

A clear description of the feature or change you’d like.

## Alternatives considered

Have you thought about other ways to achieve the same? (e.g. "Could be a separate CLI flag instead of a config option.")

## Additional context

- Use case (personal / team / CI / open source)?
- Provider(s) you use (e.g. ollama, gemini, openrouter)?
- Any mockups, examples, or links to similar tools?

## Optional: implementation ideas

If you have ideas on how this could be implemented (e.g. "reuse existing BaseAPI", "add a new command"), share them here. Not required.
